highlights.description: Multi-agent communication: agents can discover each other and send messages for task delegation and coordination
Unified JSON configuration: single config.json replaces split env vars + YAML configuration
Inbound message polling: MCP tools for agents to check for human messages during long tasks
MkDocs documentation site with comprehensive guides

added.description: Multi-agent support with agent discovery and cross-agent messaging
`list_agents` MCP tool - discover available agents and their status
`send_agent_message` MCP tool - send message to another agent
`agent_message` IPC method for daemon cross-agent routing
Agent status tracking (online/offline) in router
`source_agent_id` field in Event schema for agent-to-agent messages
`check_messages` MCP tool - poll for human messages
`get_agent_events` MCP tool - get all events with pagination
`daemon_status` MCP tool - check if daemon is running
Unified JSON configuration with environment variable substitution
`agentcomms config init` command to generate configuration
`agentcomms config validate` command to validate configuration
Daemon infrastructure for Human → Agent communication
Actor-style router with per-agent goroutines
tmux adapter for sending messages to agent terminals
Event store with SQLite database via Ent ORM
CLI commands: daemon, status, agents, send, interrupt, events, reply, channels

documentation.description: Getting Started, CLI, MCP Tools, Configuration, and Architecture guides
FEAT_INBOUND design documents (PRD, TRD, Implementation Plan)
Updated README with inbound features and daemon CLI

chore.description: Update TASKS.md with unified JSON config completion
Update dependencies and add task tracking

dependencies.description: Pin tablewriter v0.0.5 for ent v0.14.5 compatibility
Add entgo.io/ent v0.14.5 for database ORM
Add modernc.org/sqlite v1.46.1 for pure Go SQLite

highlights.description: Renamed from agentcall to agentcomms with expanded scope: voice calls AND chat messaging for AI assistants
Added chat messaging support via Discord, Telegram, and WhatsApp using the omnichat stack
Simplified imports with omnivoice v0.6.0 re-exported types

breaking.description: Environment variable prefix changed from `AGENTCALL_*` to `AGENTCOMMS_*` (legacy prefix still supported)

upgradeGuide.description: Rename environment variables from `AGENTCALL_*` to `AGENTCOMMS_*` (optional, legacy prefix still works)

added.description: Chat messaging support via omnichat integration (Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp)
`send_message` MCP tool - send message via Discord, Telegram, or WhatsApp
`list_channels` MCP tool - list available chat providers and their status
`get_messages` MCP tool - retrieve conversation history from a chat channel
`pkg/chat` package with chat manager for multi-provider routing
Configurable voice providers - TTS and STT can each be set to ElevenLabs, Deepgram, or OpenAI independently
`AGENTCOMMS_TTS_PROVIDER` environment variable to select TTS provider
`AGENTCOMMS_STT_PROVIDER` environment variable to select STT provider
OpenAI voice provider support via omnivoice-openai integration

changed.description: Module renamed from agentcall to agentcomms
Use omnivoice v0.6.0 with re-exported callsystem types for simpler imports
Migrate logging from `log` to `log/slog` for structured logging
API keys now only required for selected providers

security.description: Fix potential log injection vulnerability in user input handling

documentation.description: README updated with chat messaging documentation and architecture diagram
Add UTF-8 emoji icons to Features section
Add provider selection configuration and cost comparison table

chore.description: Remove compiled binary from git and update .gitignore

dependencies.description: Update omnivoice to v0.6.0 (re-exports callsystem types)
Add omnichat v0.3.0 for chat messaging

highlights.description: MCP plugin enabling AI coding assistants (Claude Code, AWS Kiro, Gemini CLI) to make phone calls to users for task completion, clarification, or complex discussions
Premium voice quality using ElevenLabs streaming TTS and Deepgram streaming STT
Single 53 MB Go binary with no runtime dependencies

added.description: MCP voice call plugin with omnivoice stack integration
`initiate_call` tool - start a new call to the user with initial message
`continue_call` tool - continue conversation on active call
`speak_to_user` tool - speak without waiting for response
`end_call` tool - end call with optional goodbye message
Call manager orchestrating TTS, STT, and phone providers
Multi-assistant plugin generator for Claude Code, AWS Kiro CLI, and Gemini CLI
MCP plugin configuration and build artifacts

fixed.description: Downgrade ngrok to v1.12.0 and pin log15/v3 to v3.0.0-testing.5 for build compatibility

documentation.description: README with architecture diagram, installation, configuration, and usage

ci.description: Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates
